sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 17.99 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.17)

statement.latex: Consider the group$B = a,b (bab^{-1}) a (bab^{-1})^{-1} = a^2$introduced by Baumslag in 1969. The same relation is satisfied by the functions$f(x) = 2x$and$g(x) = 2^x$under the operation of composition in the group of germs of monotonically increasing to$$continuous functions on$(0, )$, where two functions are identified if they coincide for all sufficiently large arguments. Is the representation$...
